{{Quote|Ciutric, which is the political and economic hub of the Hegemony.|[[Admiral]] [[Gial Ackbar|Ackbar]]|<ref name="IR" />}}
'''Ciutric IV''', commonly known just as '''Ciutric''', was the [[capital]] [[planet]] of the [[Ciutric Hegemony]]. The planet had at least two [[moon]]s, and was subject to frequent yet brief periods of torrential downpour.

It was an industrialized world with a small [[shipyard]], and was located at a hub of [[Hyperspace route|trade routes]].

==History==
By [[980 BBY]], the capital [[city]] of Ciutric IV was [[Daplona]]. Near Daplona was [[Darth Bane's mansion|the estate]] of [[Darth Bane]], [[Dark Lord of the Sith]]. Bane made Ciutric IV his residence after losing the [[orbalisk]] armor which prevented him from actively socializing with other [[Sentience|sentient]] beings, and he and his [[Sith apprentice|apprentice]], [[Darth Zannah]], lived there for several years.<ref name="DoE" />

Ciutric IV was a member of the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems]] during the [[Clone Wars]].

[[File:X-wingDF.jpg|thumb|left|200px|The Battle of Ciutric]]

By the [[time]] of the [[Galactic Civil War]], Ciutric IV was twenty [[parsec]]s from major [[Galactic Empire|Imperial]] garrisons. It was controlled by Imperial [[Governor]] [[Brothic]], but was later controlled by [[Prince-Admiral]] [[Delak Krennel]].

During the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], Ciutric IV was [[Attack on the Ciutric system|conquered]] by the [[Yuuzhan Vong|invaders]] at the beginning of the conflict. After the Yuuzhan Vong's defeat, Ciutric IV was situated in [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] space, and the world was a member state of [[Roan Fel]]'s [[Empire-in-exile]] as of [[137 ABY]].<ref name="TEA" />

{{Planet-stub}}
